word: H8387 - תַּאֲנַת שִׁלֹה - Taʼănath Shilôh - tah-an-ath' shee-lo' - Taanath-shiloh

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּאנת שׁלה

Transliteration: ta'ănath shilôh

Phonetic: tah-an-ath' shee-lo'

BDB Definition:

Taanath-shiloh = "approach to Shiloh"
  1. a landmark on the boundary of Ephraim

Origin: from H8385 and H7887

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
